body.title: Add weekly retrospective to day-close on Fridays
body.result: Created /weekly-retro skill + Friday trigger in day-close
body.description:
Day-close covers code health and discipline health but never asks 'are we making the right bets?' A 5-minute Friday retrospective closes the goal-level loop.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (add Friday-conditional step); agent_datacenter/skills/weekly-retro/SKILL.md (new, callable standalone)
**Design rules:** output stored to palace.retro.YYYYMMDD; feeds into the /outcome and /eval-run context
**Scope boundary:** in scope: if Friday (or manual), ask: which hypotheses confirmed/falsified this week, are goal KRs trending right, what changes about next week. Output ≤1 screen. Out of scope: automated KR updates, changing goal status automatically.
**Test plan:** skill file; verify day-close conditional fires on correct day-of-week check.
